name: VeloCommandMessage
description: Persistent chat history for the VELO Command Officer. Stores interactions between the pilot and the system operator.

intent.description: The detected intent of the message (e.g., NAVIGATE, STATUS, STAGE_ACTION)

access_level.description: Access role at the time of message (public, regular, admin)

related_mission_id.description: ID of a created mission if this message resulted in a staged action

related_log_id.description: ID of the action log entry

metadata.description: Flexible storage for command-specific data. MUST NOT store raw secrets, credentials, or payout details.

owner_user_id.description: The ID of the user who owns this message for isolation.

owner_email.description: The email of the user who owns this message for secondary isolation.
